name: ASUS TUF GAMING B550-PLUS WIFI II ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - Supports DDR4-4866(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1 x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - DisplayPort 1.2 - HDMI 2.1 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax
shortName: ASUS TUF GAMING B550-PLUS WIFI II ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4
description: ASUS TUF Gaming B550-Plus WiFi II ATX motherboard for AM4 socket with DDR4 support, PCIe 4.0, and WiFi 6.
